hero.name: Judit Ramo Solé
hero.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Building SaaS applications in startup environments for 4+ years. Specialized in React, TypeScript and Java Spring.

about.title: About Me
description: I'm a Computer Science Engineer from Universitat de Barcelona with a passion for building products that solve real problems. Over the past 4+ years, I've worked in fast-paced startup environments where I've owned features end-to-end — from product definition to deployment.

I founded Firas, a SaaS platform for construction companies, where I designed and built everything from the multi-tenant backend architecture to the user-facing frontend. I love working at the intersection of product and engineering.
Currently exploring AI-assisted development with Cursor.ai and Claude Code, always looking for ways to push what's possible.

items.description: Built a fully functional SaaS platform for construction companies to manage project finances and profitability.
highlights: Designed and developed the platform end-to-end (React, Next.js, Java Spring, MongoDB, Vercel)
Built authentication and authorization with Spring Security and JWT
Defined product roadmap through direct interviews with construction companies

items.description: AI-powered Sales Management SaaS. Worked as an external frontend developer.
highlights: Designed and implemented a new dashboard system for the web application
Built reusable UI components using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Chart.js
Delivered fully integrated features aligned with backend APIs and product specifications
Ensured responsive and performant UI across devices

items.description: CRM and Sales Management SaaS startup. Member of the Features Team.
highlights: Developed and shipped new product features in a production SaaS environment
Refactored legacy frontend modules, improving maintainability and code consistency
Collaborated with Product and Customer Success teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Contributed to onboarding and user-facing workflow improvements

items.description: Consulting project for a banking client. Collaborated with UX and innovation teams to deliver frontend features.
highlights: Delivered production-ready features using Angular and C#
Worked in a client-facing consulting environment

items.title: Firas
items.description: A SaaS platform for construction companies to manage project finances, budgets, and profitability. Full-stack application with multi-tenant architecture, JWT authentication, and a modern React frontend.

items.title: Harmonix Dashboard
items.description: Designed and built a comprehensive dashboard system for an AI-powered sales management platform. Interactive data visualizations, reusable component library, and responsive layouts.

items.title: Portfolio Website
items.description: This very website! A modern, responsive portfolio built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features dark/light mode, multi-language support, and smooth scroll animations.

items.title: WheresIt
items.description: A home organization app built around a nested location system, allowing items to be stored, moved, and tracked within places inside places. Designed to make finding everyday objects simple and reliable.
Software Design, Data Structures, Web and Mobile Apps, Distributed Software and Networks.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, or just a good conversation about tech. Feel free to reach out!
